name: Orange Chicken Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken mix in a dish so that the chicken is on top.
2. Top with mandarin oranges.
3. On the side, combine the orange juice, soy sauce, garlic powder, dry mustard, and cornstarch.
4. Pour this mixture over the chicken.
5. Freeze until ready to eat.
6. To serve, heat through.
